description: Small fragment of a letter addressed to Isḥāq b. ʿAllūn. In Judaeo-Arabic, with the address in both Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic script on verso. On the addressee, cf. Bodl. MS heb. b 13/37, ENA 3740.7, and T-S 10J32.2. Dating: Probably 11th century. Mentions: "on the eve of Shabbat/Saturday... it/she came to you with their brother... buy for me with you...." Not much else is preserved. ASE
